\tzpentry{ID5610}{Main Chemical Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5610 introduces Main Chemical Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mu(\bm{x})=\mu_{\rm base}\Bigl[1+\varepsilon_\mu\,G(r,\theta,\phi)\Bigr], \end{equation}
